chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5959 of 2025 [Mst. Parveen V. Province of Sindh and others] Date Order with signature of Judge(s) Before: Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Main Case. Date of hearing and Order: 05.03.2026 Mr. Abdul Aziz Kanhar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for the Respondent/KMC. Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, A.A.G. Mr. Nadeem Shaikh, Director Law, Town Municipal, Korangi. ********** O R D E R Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. – Petitioner Mst. Parveen has filed this Constitution Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking directions to the respondents for release of her retirement benefits, including gratuity, and other dues after her retirement. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner was appointed as Sanitary Worker (BPS-02) in the Health Sanitation Department, Town Municipal Corporation Korangi, Karachi and retired on 31.12.2024, however, her pensionary benefits have not yet been released. 3. Learned counsel for Respondent-KMC states that the petitioner’s pension/outstanding dues shall be released within two weeks. 4. Learned counsel for the petitioner, on instructions, seeks disposal of the petition in terms of the said statement. 5. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
